summary: Tested Virtual Try-On, AI Size Prediction, and Inventory Alert features. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend Virtual Try-On page loads correctly with all tabs and features working - manual measurements, size recommendation, saved profiles.

features_tested.details: Returns list of saved measurement profiles
Creates manual and AI-detected measurement profiles with all fields (height, chest, waist, hip, shoulder, armLength, inseam, neck)
Returns predicted size with confidence level based on purchase history. Test customer 6843c4ef-fe7c-4bb2-ad7f-8c93713c6f02 returns M with 20% confidence (default - no purchase history)

features_tested.feature: AI Size Prediction - 404 for invalid customer

features_tested.details: Returns size distribution and recommendations for inventory planning (fixed route order issue)
Bulk size prediction for multiple customers works
Returns alert settings with threshold, channels, recipients
Updates threshold (set to 5 as per context), channels, and notification recipients
Triggers alert check and creates alerts for low stock items
Returns fit_score, fit_verdict, suggestions (fixed _id: null MongoDB error)

features_tested.feature: Frontend - Virtual Trial Room page loads
features_tested.details: Page accessible via sidebar under 'EXTRA FEATURES' section
All 7 measurement inputs (Chest, Waist, Hip, Shoulder, Arm Length, Inseam, Neck) work correctly
Recommended Size: M displayed with fit analysis (chest: perfect, waist: perfect, hip: perfect)
Button works, shows success toast 'Custom measurements saved!'
Shows saved measurement profiles with 'Use This' button
Tab shows 'Select Clothing' section and 'Virtual Fitting Preview'

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed FastAPI route order issue: /size-prediction/analytics was being matched as /size-prediction/{customer_id} - moved specific routes before parameterized routes
Fixed MongoDB _id: null duplicate key error in virtual_tryon_history insert - removed explicit _id:None to let MongoDB auto-generate
seed_data_creation: Multiple body measurement profiles created via tests and UI (Height: 175cm, Chest: 96cm, Waist: 82cm, Hip: 98cm). Test customer 6843c4ef-fe7c-4bb2-ad7f-8c93713c6f02 used for size prediction tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Virtual Try-On page is under EXTRA FEATURES in sidebar. Body measurements CRUD and AI size prediction APIs fully working. Inventory alert settings stored in inventory_alert_settings collection. Threshold configurable. Test customer ID: 6843c4ef-fe7c-4bb2-ad7f-8c93713c6f02. Virtual Try-On tab shows 'No clothing items available' because no items are categorized as 'clothing' in items collection - this is expected behavior.
